cohort: 10 healthy subjects, 3 h after 100 g oral glucose
notes: Total splanchnic glucose OUTPUT over 3 h post oral glucose; net increase above basal 15±3 g. Whole splanchnic bed.

cohort: 21 surgical patients with normal liver function
notes: RARE portal-vein data. Intestinal ammonia release EXACTLY EQUALED hepatic ammonia uptake (complete hepatic first-pass extraction); kidney releases ammonia systemically. No absolute flux number in abstract → value null but qualitative hepatic-extraction finding is key.
Abstract NOT retrievable this session (no DOI, PMID 7372062). Method known (tracer urea synthesis rate). No numeric value obtainable → fully null. Methodological citation only.
